sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and amt1 = 0 and amt2 = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr,Flex7 = c.FXCaption,Flex8 = c.FXCaptionRecon from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set FSitem = f.FSitem, FSitemDesc = f.FSitemDesc from TransX t inner join Fsitems f on t.GL >= f.FromGL and t.GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set PCdesc = c.Name, Flex5 = c.ExposureLoc, Flex6 = c.Division, cc = c.Crcy from TransX t inner join Companies c on t.Co = c.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set CCdesc = 'Assets' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '1%'
update TransX set CCdesc = 'Liabilities' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '2%'
update TransX set TPname = 'U/W Assets', Zone = 'I' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '1%'
update TransX set TPname = 'U/W Liabilities - Net', Zone = 'I' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '2%'
update TransX set TPname = m.Descr, Zone = m.Field3 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.GL >= m.Field1 and t.GL <= m.Field2 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m.Table_ID = 'R40' and m.ID = 'GL'
update TransX set Flex1 = cast(r.Rate as varchar(255)) from TransX t inner join CrcyRates r on t.Crcy = r.Crcy where KeyID = '[batchID]' and r.Typ = 'S' and r.EffDate = '[PQyyyy-mm-dd]'
update TransX set Flex2 = cast(r.Rate as varchar(255)) from TransX t inner join CrcyRates r on t.Crcy = r.Crcy where KeyID = '[batchID]' and r.Typ = 'S' and r.EffDate = '[yyyy-mm-dd]'
update TransX set Amt3 = round(Amt1 + Amt2,2) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex3 = cast((cast(Flex2 as float) - cast(Flex1 as float)) as varchar(255)), Flex4 = cast((cast(Flex1 as float) + cast(Flex2 as float))/2 as varchar(255)) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Amt4 = round(-Amt1 * cast(Flex3 as float),2), Amt5 = round(-Amt2 * (cast(Flex2 as float)-cast(Flex4 as float)),2) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Amt6 = round(Amt4 + Amt5,2) where KeyID = '[batchID]'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, Amt1, Amt2) values ('[batchID]','[Yr][Mo]',[Yr],[Mo],
